subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Dhabih 2
subcodes.first_line: Unto thee hath been sent, from the right hand of the All-Glorious, what was revealed for thee from the heaven of the clemency of thy Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذ ب قد ارسل الیک من یمن السبحان ما نزل لک من سماء رحمه ربک و منه تفوح رایحه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies
